name: Help Scout

composio_registry_match.name: Help Scout
composio_registry_match.description: Help Scout provides customer support software with shared inbox, knowledge base, and customer management tools

description: A customer support and helpdesk platform that combines email, live chat, and AI-powered automation to manage customer relationships.
notes: Help Scout has a well-documented public REST API for managing conversations, customers, mailboxes, and workflows, which is highly suitable for agent toolkits.
